% This is generated by ESQL's LeftTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

## Example

```esql
FROM employees
| KEEP last_name
| EVAL left = LEFT(last_name, 3)
```

| last_name:keyword | left:keyword |
| --- | --- |
| Awdeh | Awd |
| Azuma | Azu |
| Baek | Bae |
| Bamford | Bam |
| Bernatsky | Ber |
